system.description:
[1 load] A belt worn on the hip or chest that holds various gadgets and canisters filled with useful compounds. Choose an effect from the list below for each use.

  • Alkahest: Neutralizes the effects of other chemicals or agents.

  • Cloak Dust: Bends light around coated objects, making them harder to see. Lasts for about twenty minutes.

  • Firechoke Foam: A rapidly expanding foam which suffocates flame and is difficult to wade through.

  • Fuse Resin: Permanently fuses two surfaces until parted with a neutralizing agent—or extreme, damaging force.

  • Howl Blossoms: Preserved blooms which produce a raucous howling when disturbed.

  • Meltbrick: A brick of moldable clay that hardens or softens when a current is run through it. Comes with wireless electric tabs that you can link to your slate.

  • Slipwater: Reduces the friction between two surfaces to nearly zero.

  • Somnic Smoke: Causes immense, incapacitating drowsiness.

  • Quickbriar: Splash water on one of these buds to watch it grow rapidly and explosively, coating an object in thorny vines.

  • Zap Token: Stick one to an unprotected electronic to short it out. Dangerous, but sometimes useful.
